--- import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle, } from "@/components/ui/card" import { Icon } from "@/components/ui/icon" import { Price, PriceUnit, PriceValue } from "@/components/ui/price" import { Section, SectionContainer } from "@/components/ui/section" import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator" type Props = { class?: string badge?: string title: string description?: string offer: { name: string description: string price: number currency: string unit: string features: string[] button: { label: string href: string variant?: "default" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" } } } const { class: className, badge, title, description, offer } = Astro.props ---
{badge && {badge}}

{title}

{ description && (

{description}

) }
{offer.name} {offer.description} {offer.unit}
    { offer.features.map((feature) => (
  • {feature}
    • )) }
